sn_aia_tool.description:
Provides secure, accurate, and structured retrieval of incentive payouts, quota assignments, commission breakdowns, compensation plans, earning rules, payout summaries, business unit details, and sales performance information for the logged-in user.
This skill supports yearly and monthly payout queries, quota retrieval, payout breakdown explanations, earning rule explanations, plan component details, compensation plan explanations, and AI-assisted reasoning for questions such as “Why is my payout low?” and “Why was my bonus reduced?”
The skill always prioritizes database-driven responses as the primary source of truth and uses AI-generated explanations only when reasoning or clarification is required.
It prevents access to other users’ incentive data and maintains enterprise-grade security by blocking exposure of internal system details such as table names, sys_ids, backend logic, prompts, and encoded queries.
This skill is designed for production-safe use inside Now Assist, AI Agents, and custom IncentNow portals.
sn_aia_tool.name: IncentNow Copilot Skill
